steps.title: Substitute to form a quadratic equation
steps.content:
Since $y = x^2$ and $x + y = 12$, substitute the parabola into the linear equation:
$$x + x^2 = 12$$
$$x^2 + x - 12 = 0$$

steps.title: Factor and identify the answer
steps.content: Factoring: $(x + 4)(x - 3) = 0$ gives $x = -4$ or $x = 3$. Only $x = 3$ appears among the choices. That matches choice D — D is correct.
